name: CheckSmart
description_short: CheckSmart is located at 6895 W 130th St, Parma Heights, OH 44130. Google reviewers rate the branch 4.8 stars across 162 reviews. Call +1 440-842-0426.
description_long:
CheckSmart operates physical retail locations across Ohio, including a prominent store on Morse Road in Columbus. The company functions primarily as a financial services hub rather than a direct lender—they partner with third-party, unaffiliated lenders to offer loan products to customers. Their business model centers on providing convenient access to short-term lending alongside traditional check-cashing and money movement services.

The company's service portfolio includes check cashing, money orders, wire transfers, bill pay, Green Dot Visa debit card issuance, and gift card-to-cash exchanges. They also facilitate short-term loans through their lending partners, positioning themselves as a one-stop financial services provider for consumers who may lack traditional banking relationships. Customers can schedule appointments online to streamline the loan application process.

CheckSmart distinguishes itself through multi-location convenience (11+ Ohio locations across Columbus, Heath, Marion, Marysville, Reynoldsburg, Springfield, and Whitehall) and extended operating hours, including Friday service until 8:00 PM. They emphasize in-person customer service and preparation tools to help applicants move through the lending process efficiently. The company explicitly frames itself around delivering "exceptional short-term lending experience and best in class customer service."

A critical caveat is that CheckSmart does not originate loans directly—they facilitate access to third-party lender products, meaning terms, rates, and approval decisions rest entirely with unaffiliated lenders. The website provides no transparency on APR ranges, loan amounts, or repayment terms, requiring customers to visit in-person or contact them directly for specific lending details. This opacity, combined with the short-term lending focus, suggests products likely carry higher costs than traditional personal loans.
pros: Multiple Ohio locations (11+ stores) providing geographic convenience
Extended business hours including Friday until 8:00 PM and weekend service
Online appointment scheduling to reduce in-store wait times
Bundled financial services (check cashing, wire transfers, bill pay, debit cards) in one location
Quick lending decisions and funding for approved applicants
Accepts Green Dot prepaid cards, expanding payment access
Staff available to answer questions and guide customers through application process
cons: No direct lending—all loans are third-party products with unknown terms, rates, and APRs not disclosed on website
Likely high-cost short-term borrowing typical of check-cashing storefronts, but specific pricing unavailable
Requires in-person store visit to obtain loan details; no online loan calculators or rate previews
No mention of credit-building features, financial counseling, or alternative products for consumers seeking to improve creditworthiness
Limited transparency on lending partner qualifications, terms ranges, or maximum loan amounts
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing or wire transfer services
Ohio residents seeking same-day or next-day emergency cash from a physical storefront
Customers requiring multiple financial services (check cashing + lending + bill pay) in one location
diagnosis: CheckSmart is best suited for consumers in Ohio who need immediate check-cashing or money movement services and are willing to visit a physical location. The primary caveat is that lending products are sourced from undisclosed third-party lenders with non-transparent terms—customers should expect potentially high-cost short-term borrowing and must visit in-store to learn actual rates and conditions.
services: Green Dot Visa debit card issuance
